run.description: Build the issue queue and dispatch one issue thread per issue, then report the handoff table.
run.argumentHint: [issue numbers or URLs, or empty for all unlabeled]

setup.description: Scaffold the project playbooks into docs/agents/ and offer to install matching external skills.

diagnose.description: Reproduce, locate, and fix a bug, confirming the failing path passes.

plan.description: Decide whether an enhancement needs a plan, write it, and stop at the approval gate.

implement.description: Build an approved plan or an agreed small enhancement.

refactor.description: Make a behavior-preserving change locked by tests.

verify.description: Run the repo's checks and capture evidence for a branch or PR.

adversarial-review.description: Run reviewer and fixer subagents on a PR until LGTM or the iteration cap.
